bodyText:
What is transfer pricing services? Transfer pricing study, documentation, benchmarking, TP audit defence, APA advisory, and ITAT appeal representation.
Transfer Pricing Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Mangalore, Karnataka since 2012.
Quick Answer: Transfer Pricing in Mangalore — Transfer pricing study, documentation, benchmarking, TP audit defence, APA advisory, and ITAT appeal. From ₹75,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Transfer Pricing Services in Mangalore
Virtual Auditor provides transfer pricing services in Mangalore, Karnataka. Port city and banking capital of Karnataka. Our multi-credential practice (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) ensures comprehensive professional service delivery.
ROC jurisdiction: ROC Bangalore. Pincode: 575001.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• TP Study & Documentation (Form 3CEB)
• Benchmarking Analysis

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: FAR Analysis
Functions, Assets, and Risks analysis of related party transactions
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Benchmarking
Identify comparable companies and compute arm's length range
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: Documentation
Prepare TP study report and Form 3CEB
• 4
HEADING3: Step 4: Filing
File Form 3CEB with income tax return
• 5
HEADING3: Step 5: Audit Defence
Represent before TPO/DRP if adjustment proposed

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Mangalore
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your transfer pricing is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: When is transfer pricing documentation required?
faqs.a: When aggregate value of international transactions exceeds ₹1 crore, or specified domestic transactions exceed ₹20 crore.
Chartered accountant's report certifying arm's length nature of international and domestic related party transactions. Due by 31st October.
Yes. We handle TPO proceedings, DRP references, and ITAT appeals for transfer pricing disputes.

faqs.q: Do you provide transfer pricing in Mangalore?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Mangalore, Karnataka. Port city and banking capital of Karnataka. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Mangalore?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Mangalore clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with transfer pricing in Mangalore?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Mangalore businesses with no location surcharges.
